# dependency_injection — flutter

| Pattern | Description |
|---|---|
| `external_dependencies` | Third-party instances registered via `@module` abstract class with `@preResolve` for async futures. |
| `get_it` | `get_it` service locator + `injectable` annotation-driven code generation, one DI module per feature. |
| `registration_order` | `injectable` resolves registration order automatically via the dependency graph. |
